summary: V3 Signal Card UI testing completed successfully. All required features are working: V3SignalCard renders without errors, shows 'Nessun Setup Attivo' when no setup, displays market context (regime, bias, energy) even without setup, has proper data-testid attributes, refreshes every 30 seconds, and is positioned side by side with V2 card for comparison. No active setup was available during testing, so phase badge with active setup (SETUP_DETECTED/WAITING_FOR_RETEST/ENTRY_READY), direction badge (LONG/SHORT), entry zone, stop loss, targets, and expand/collapse functionality for active setups could not be tested live but code review confirms proper implementation.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error - unrelated to V3 feature

passed_tests: V3SignalCard shows 'Nessun Setup Attivo' when no setup
V3SignalCard displays market context: Bias (BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL with %)
V3SignalCard displays market context: Energy with compression level
V3SignalCard shows 'In attesa di evento 4H' waiting message when no setup
V3SignalCard shows data freshness in footer (ms, candles count)
Dashboard shows V2 and V3 cards side by side (lg:grid-cols-2 layout)
V3SignalCard configured to refresh every 30 seconds
V3SignalCard has refresh button in header
tests_not_executed: V3SignalCard phase badge (SETUP_DETECTED/WAITING_FOR_RETEST/ENTRY_READY) - no active setup available
V3SignalCard direction badge (LONG/SHORT) - no active setup available
V3SignalCard entry zone display - no active setup available
V3SignalCard stop loss display - no active setup available
V3SignalCard targets (T1/T2) display - no active setup available
V3SignalCard quality score display - no active setup available
V3SignalCard R:R ratio display - no active setup available
V3SignalCard 5M confirmation status - no active setup available
V3SignalCard expand/collapse button - only appears with active setup
V3SignalCard expanded details view - only appears with active setup

code_review_verification.phase_badge_implementation: Verified in code: PHASE_CONFIG defines SETUP_DETECTED (blue), WAITING_FOR_RETEST (yellow, pulsing), ENTRY_READY (green, pulsing), EXECUTED (purple), EXPIRED (gray), INVALIDATED (red)
code_review_verification.direction_badge_implementation: Verified in code: renderDirectionBadge() shows LONG (green) or SHORT (red) with TrendingUp/TrendingDown icons
code_review_verification.entry_zone_display: Verified in code: Shows zone_low to zone_high range with formatPrice()
code_review_verification.stop_loss_display: Verified in code: Shows stop_loss with Shield icon in red background
code_review_verification.targets_display: Verified in code: Shows target_1 and target_2 with Target icons in green background
code_review_verification.quality_score_display: Verified in code: Shows quality_score/100 with color coding (green >=80, yellow >=60, orange >=40, red <40)
code_review_verification.rr_ratio_display: Verified in code: Shows risk_reward_ratio with color coding (green >=1.5, yellow >=1.0, red <1.0)
code_review_verification.5m_confirmation_display: Verified in code: Shows confirmation_type or 'In attesa'/'Pending' if not confirmed
code_review_verification.expand_collapse_implementation: Verified in code: Button only renders when hasSetup is true, toggles expanded state
code_review_verification.expanded_details: Verified in code: Shows structure details (swing high/low, buffer), target details with types, liquidity context, whale context, phase history
code_review_verification.30s_refresh: Verified in code: setInterval(fetchV3Signal, 30000) in useEffect

critical_code_review_comments: V3SignalCard properly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
Component correctly handles loading state with data-testid='v3-signal-card-loading'
Market context is always displayed even without active setup (good UX)
Expand/collapse button correctly hidden when no active setup
Direction badge correctly hidden when no active setup
All interactive elements have proper styling and hover states
Data freshness footer provides useful debugging info (ms timing, candle counts)
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 Signal Card UI has been tested in 'no active setup' state. All features verified working: card renders, shows 'Nessun Setup Attivo', displays market context (regime/bias/energy), has data-testid attributes, refreshes every 30s, positioned side-by-side with V2 card. To test active setup features (phase badge, direction, entry zone, stop loss, targets, quality, R:R, 5M confirmation, expand/collapse), need to wait for market to generate an active V3 setup. API endpoint: /api/v3/trade-signal. Key data-testids: 'v3-signal-card', 'v3-signal-card-loading', 'trade-signal-card' (V2).
